title: NPU nm1 tanh vec enable
hypothesis: A bounded int8 tanh op can be integrated into the fixed nm1 vec path and physically characterized as a tanh-enabled NPU block, providing the correct physical source for later Layer 2 tanh activation-family campaigns.

direct_comparison.primary_question: Can we produce an accepted tanh-enabled nm1 NPU design point with real physical metrics before any Layer 2 tanh mapping campaign runs?
include: one bounded tanh-enabled nm1 block design/config variant
one focused Layer 1 physical sweep on that integrated design
exclude: broad nonlinear family claims beyond bounded tanh enablement
follow_on_broad_sweep: return to Layer 2 terminal tanh work only after this integrated physical source is accepted

expected_result.reason: the goal is to establish the first accepted tanh-enabled nm1 block physical metrics
